message: Added a runnable addendum JSON upload example using PluginPackageJsonSerializer.Export and PluginServer.InstallJsonAsync, referenced SafeIR.Serialization.Json from the example project, and documented the package/namespace requirement in README and addendum docs. Validation: dotnet build examples/Addendum/SafeIR.AddendumExamples/SafeIR.AddendumExamples.csproj --configuration Release; dotnet run --project examples/Addendum/SafeIR.AddendumExamples/SafeIR.AddendumExamples.csproj --configuration Release --no-build; ./scripts/check-docs-smoke.ps1 -Configuration Release; ./scripts/check-csharp-file-lines.ps1; ./scripts/agentq.ps1 doctor.
